description: The procurement department is ready to officially award a contract to the winning bidder.

nodes.task_description: Identify the contract and the selected winning vendor.

expected_outcome.value: The procurement officer has the details of the winning bid.

nodes.task_description: Generate the official contract documents for signature.

expected_outcome.value: The officer successfully generates the legal contract.

nodes.task_description: Send the contract to the vendor for signature and notify the unsuccessful bidders of the outcome.

expected_outcome.value: The officer sends the contract for execution and sends notifications to all other bidders.
